markdown_content:
## Executive Summary

User requested creation and deployment of a comprehensive website for senior housing options near Annecy, France, with detailed services, prices, and distances. Manus successfully deployed the site but encountered broken links which were subsequently debugged and mostly fixed. The website includes 100+ housing options, pricing details, and advanced filtering features.


## Context & Intent

User needed a comprehensive directory website for senior housing options in the Annecy region, including detailed service information, pricing, availability, and distances to key locations.


## What Was Done

Created and deployed a complete senior housing directory website with EHPAD listings, assisted living options, home services, pricing details, and interactive features. Debugged and fixed JavaScript errors when links were reported as broken.


## Outputs Produced

- [website] Senior Housing Annecy Directory — Complete senior housing website with 100+ options, pricing, services, and location data
- [deployment] Initial Site — First deployment at https://ygvztwtr.manus.space
- [debugging] Fixed Site — Corrected version at https://reoaxeou.manus.space with JavaScript fixes

## Key Decisions & Validations

- Included 100+ housing options as requested
- Used color-coded service indicators
- Added interactive comparison and filtering features
- Focused on Annecy region with distance calculations

## Lessons Learned

Worked well:

- Comprehensive research and data organization
- Color-coded service identification
- Responsive design implementation
Failed / suboptimal:

- Initial JavaScript errors in React components
- Routing configuration issues
Discoveries:

- React component safety checks needed for undefined arrays
- SPA routing configuration critical for multi-page functionality

## Challenges & Blockers

- JavaScript errors causing broken links
- React component crashes on undefined data
- One page (Distances & Transport) still has issues

## Open Questions

- Should the remaining Distance & Transport page be fixed?
- Are all the housing options and pricing accurate?

## Next Steps

- Fix the remaining Distances & Transport page issue
- Verify data accuracy and update links
- Consider adding more interactive features
---
